assertions.expectation: Checks for deprecated API usage that may have changed behavior in 1.30
assertions.reason: The response checks for deprecated API usage but for 1.32, not 1.30 as specified in the expectation

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking admission webhooks — they may be rejecting or slowing down requests on the new version
assertions.reason: Response includes detailed section on admission webhook compatibility issues with specific commands to check webhook failures and configurations

assertions.expectation: Advises checking if resource requests/limits need adjusting for any system components that changed
assertions.reason: Response mentions checking system component resource usage with 'kubectl top pods -n kube-system' and discusses resource pressure from pod redistribution

assertions.expectation: Suggests examining kube-system pods for any that are crashlooping or restarting
assertions.reason: Response specifically includes commands to check kube-system pods and explicitly mentions looking for 'crashlooping or frequently restarting pods'

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check API server metrics and latency (kubectl get --raw /metrics)
assertions.reason: Response includes 'kubectl get --raw /metrics | grep apiserver_request_total' command to check API server metrics

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking if NetworkPolicy or service mesh components need updating for the new version
assertions.reason: Response includes sections on both NetworkPolicy issues and service mesh control plane compatibility with specific commands and upgrade recommendations

assertions.expectation: Advises reviewing pod events for scheduling delays or readiness probe failures
assertions.reason: Response includes multiple commands to check events across namespaces and specifically suggests testing pod creation to validate behavior

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking if HPA or VPA are behaving differently on the new version
assertions.reason: Response includes dedicated section on HPA/VPA behavioral changes with specific commands and explains that Kubernetes 1.32 may have updated HPA algorithms
